title: Resume/Portfolio Website with Contact Retrieval
description: Built a full portfolio website with section-based navigation, contact form, localStorage JSON response storage, admin login, dynamic response retrieval with timestamps, and light/dark theme toggle.

title: SnapCut AI - Background Removal Tool
description: Developed an AI-powered web application to remove image backgrounds instantly. Built a modern responsive UI, integrated image upload and processing workflow, and deployed it for real-world usage.

title: RoboSaga Hackathon Project
description: Participated in RoboSaga Hackathon and contributed to a C++ based project. Collaborated in a team environment to solve real-world problems and applied algorithmic thinking under time constraints.

title: React Components Contact Cards Project
description: Planned React SPA to create users from form inputs and dynamically render reusable contact cards inside a parent UserList component with modular folder structure.

title: React Mini Project - Like/Unlike Card
description: Planned React mini project with reusable card component, title passed through props, and like/unlike state managed via useState hook.

title: Portfolio of Sourav Kumar - AI/ML Student, Developer, and Problem Solver
description: A personal portfolio website with modern sections, responsive design, contact form, admin response retrieval, and light/dark theme support.
